title: Corn Muffins Ole
instructions: In a large bowl, mix together flour, cornmeal, sugar, baking powder, and pepper flakes.
In a separate bowl, whisk together egg, milk, oil, and corn.
Pour the liquid mixture over the dry ingredients and stir lightly, using no more than 15-20 strokes to mix.
Coat 12 2½-inch muffin cups with vegetable oil spray.
Fill each muffin cup ½ full with batter and reserve 1/3 of the remaining batter.
Make a small depression in the center of each muffin filling with a teaspoon.
Drop 1 teaspoon of jalapeno jelly into each depression.
Divide the reserved batter over the muffins to cover the jelly.
Bake in a preheated oven at 375 degrees for 25 minutes or until light golden brown.
Let muffins rest in the pan for 3-5 minutes.
Carefully lift muffins out of the pan.
Let cool for 10-15 minutes before serving.
notes: Jalapeno pepper jelly is optional for those who prefer less spice
Do not overmix the batter to keep muffins tender
